note: First practical sewing machine contested: Thimonnier 1830, Hunt 1833 before Howe 1846.
Lippershey filed first telescope patent 1608; Galileo only improved it.
Madison Father of the Constitution; Jefferson in France, absent from Convention.
Berners-Lee invented WWW 1989; Gates the more-famous-but-wrong tech figure.
Melody is Smith's To Anacreon in Heaven; Key wrote only the lyrics.
Algeria largest African country by area since 2011; DR Congo second.
Baikal largest by volume; Superior largest only by surface area.
France 12 time zones via territories; Russia 11.
Oregon honey fungus ~2385 acres largest by area; blue whale largest by mass.
Missouri (2341mi) longer than Mississippi (2320mi); both entirely within US.
Antarctica Vostok -89.2C coldest recorded; Oymyakon only coldest inhabited.
Mauna Loa largest active volcano by volume; Fuji far smaller.
Giant huntsman largest leg span; Goliath birdeater largest only by mass.
Ivory Coast top cocoa producer; Switzerland grows none.
Sweden vs Norway islands margin ~12%, counting-method dependent.
Alaska largest US state by area; Texas second.
Tomato domesticated in Mesoamerica/Mexico; Italy adopted post-Columbus.
Potato domesticated in Andes/Peru; Ireland only famous for later reliance.
US ~16000 golf courses, far most; Scotland only home of golf.
China top rice producer; India second.
Czech Republic highest beer per capita; Germany more famous.
Turkey #1 tea per capita by wide margin; UK only third.
Aluminum most abundant metal in crust (~8%); iron second (~5%).
Ecuador largest banana exporter; Costa Rica far behind.
India ~70% of wild tigers; China almost none.
Guinness lists Australia feral camels largest wild population; Saudi domesticated.
Mexico ~130M native Spanish speakers vs Spain ~47M.
Brazil ~210M native Portuguese speakers vs Portugal ~10M.
Egypt most populous Arab country; Saudi Arabia far fewer.
Sacramento California capital; Los Angeles larger, more famous.
Albany New York State capital; NYC the distractor.
Tallahassee Florida capital; Miami more famous.
Springfield Illinois capital; Chicago far larger.
Lansing Michigan capital; Detroit the distractor.
Carson City Nevada capital; Las Vegas far more famous.
Olympia Washington State capital; Seattle the distractor.
Victoria British Columbia capital; Vancouver larger.
Swigert radioed it first; misattributed to commander Lovell who repeated it.
Jenner smallpox vaccine 1796; Pasteur the famous confusion.
Franklin's lab produced Photo 51; Watson used it and got fame.
Benz built first practical ICE automobile 1885; Ford mass-produced later.
Magie patented Landlord's Game 1904; Darrow wrongly credited.
Bi Sheng invented movable type ~1040; Gutenberg ~400 years later.
Howe held foundational 1846 lockstitch patent Singer licensed.
Jefferson primary author of Declaration; Washington the distractor.
Becquerel discovered radioactivity 1896; Curie coined term, shared later fame.
